item.title: FBI releases description of suspect, increases reward in Nancy Guthrie case
item.description: The FBI describes the armed man caught on Nancy Guthrie's camera as 5-foot-9-inches to 5-foot-10 and of average build. The 84-year-old mother of Savan...

item.title: Virginia court allows Democrats' redistricting vote in their plan to counter to Trump
item.description: The ruling allows an April election where voters can let the legislature draw a new congressional map. It could help Democrats win more House seats. R...

item.title: A familiar move with a new twist: Trump tries to cut CDC funds he just signed into law
item.description: A federal judge in Illinois quickly issued a restraining order after the Trump administration slashed more than $600 million in CDC grants to four blu...

item.title: Kitty cats and cloud hands - how U.S. Olympic snowboarders keep calm in competition
item.description: U.S. snowboarders psych themselves up before competition with heavy metal and pop music, cat photos, and apparently many on the men's halfpipe team no...

item.title: Minnesota immigration crackdown will end, border czar says. And, DHS funding to expire
item.description: Border czar Tom Homan announced that the Trump administration will end the immigration crackdown in Minnesota. And, DHS funding is set to expire after...
